Mining_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "CC76F47E4F34114A220C89A2468C0610", "Nodes are clumps of Resources which can be broken apart with Roland's Mining Laser. You can highlight mineable Nodes in the environment by using your suit's Scan Ability (X). Interact (LMB) with a Node to begin channeling Energy into it with each Laser blast, just like with the Scrap previously. Due to Meridian's unstable geology, Nodes will re-appear over time and may emerge in different locations than previously!")

Mining_2.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "EC6980314C5772FF353F4BB5565E7548", "Each shot from his <Important>Mining Laser</> drains Roland's <Important>Energy</> - this is shown by the fullness of the circle that makes up your cursor.

<Important>Energy</> will recharge to full over time but you <Important>cannot mine when it is too low</>.

Different types of <Important>Node</> will require different amounts of <Important>Energy</> to fracture - you will not be able to mine everything immediately.

You will be able to purchase <Important>Upgrades</> for Roland's <Important>Energy</> level in the future.")
